channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin Explains Why She Chose Taylor Swift's 'Ruin the Friendship' to Celebrate Her Gold Olympic Medal (Exclusive)
item.description: Shiffrin's post featuring Swift's lyric got a shout-out from the Grammy winner herself

item.title: Did Carolyn Bessette Inspire This âSex and the Cityâ Character?
item.description: One 'Sex and the City' actress said she drew inspiration from Carolyn Bessette, JFK Jr.'s wife, during her audition for the HBO show

item.title: Taye Diggs Emphasizes Importance of Early Cancer Detection After Mom and Stepdad Died 'Earlier Than Expected' (Exclusive)
item.description: The 55-year-old actor's mother and stepfather both died from cancer

item.title: Inside the Night That Changed Everything for Kate Middleton and Prince William After Their 2007 Breakup
item.description: A new biography reveals how the Prince and Princess of Wales came back together

item.title: Brad Pitt and Girlfriend Ines de Ramon Make an Incognito Touchdown in Greece, Plus Kelly Clarkson, John Legend and More
item.description: From New York City to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Astrologer Breaks Down Jessica Alba & Danny Ramirez's Compatibility
item.description: Jessica Alba and Danny Ramirez's relationship heated up quickly ... but, ya gotta wonder if they're soulmates -- and, an expert astrologer is here to ...

item.title: Sky Bri Hot Shots to Celebrate Her 27th Birthday!
item.description: Sky Bri's hottest shots are sure to blow the internet sky-high ... click through her beautiful birthday gallery to see for yourself! The OnlyFans star...

item.title: Keeta Vaccaro Asks Court To Make Tyreek Hill Pay For Bathroom Repairs In Home
item.description: Tyreek Hill and Keeta Vaccaro's relationship is in the crapper, literally ... 'cause the bathroom has actually become a point of contention in the div...

item.title: 'RHOC's Meghan King Accuses Jim Edmonds of Leaking Her Number to Sex Workers
item.description: 'Real Housewives of Orange County' alum Meghan King accused her ex-husband Jim Edmonds of leaking her cell phone to sex workers to harass her years ag...

item.title: Hot Babes In Cold Snow Guess Who!
item.description: These babes in the snow may be freezing, but at least they're slaying! Grab your snow boots and warm up with this stellar set of steamy stars ... As y...
